titleStmt.title: National Library of Sweden, A 167
titleStmt.sponsor: Medieval Latin Manuscripts in the National Library: Cataloguing and Digitization
titleStmt.funder: Riksbankens jubileumsfond – The Swedish Foundation for Humanities and Social Sciences

publicationStmt.publisher: manuscripta.se: A Digital Catalogue of Medieval and Early Modern Manuscripts in Sweden

supportDesc.foliation: Modern foliation in pencil. hebraicam ueritatem

collation.signatures: Quire signatures in Roman numerals in brown ink on all quires except one (number 26). Occasional leaf numbers in Roman numerals in blue ink.

p.note: Top of page, in dark brown ink by a modern hand: Kgl. Bibl. 1784 års Kat. Theol. in 4o no. 1. Biblia Sacra secundum versionem Sti Hieronymi. Below, in pencil: Synes ha tillhört Oliva Kloster, se ant. å sista bladet, v: anno Domini 1433 desolata est Oliua a Polonis Hussitis etc die Egidii.
Top of page, in brown ink by an early modern hand: Biblia Sacra.
Middle of page, in pencil by a modern hand: illegible notes.

binding.p: Early modern binding (16th or 17th century) in light yellow parchment with two cloth straps on and . 4 double raised bands and 2 endbands. , and coloured in red. : In brown ink: Biblia Latina. Stamped in gold: current signum (A 167). Older paper labels with the following signa: 1, e.30.5.18. In brown ink: 127 and a paper label with the signum 63 and some illegible text.

provenance.p: The manuscript probably belonged to the Cistercian monastery at Oliwa (see note on ) in the 15th century.

acquisition.p: The volume was most likely taken as spoils of war during the Thirty Years' War. In the catalogue of 1734 (U 125e, p. 43) listed as no. 1 of the quarto manuscripts.

msItem.title: On Bible readings for the liturgical year
msItem.incipit: disce per hoc scriptum quid sit vel quando legendum
msItem.explicit: post natalem sacrum recitat sacra leccio paulum

msItem.title: On the order of the Biblical books
msItem.incipit: Sunt genes ex le nu deu Jo iu ruth rex pal es ne
msItem.explicit: docmata canonicus est apocalipsis et actus

msItem.title: Summarium Biblicum
msItem.incipit: Sex prohibet peccant abel enoch archa fit intrant
msItem.explicit: dragmas eupatoris fraus alchima mors nycanoris
msItem.note:
On this text, see Doležalová (2013)
, and Doležalová (2007).

msItem.title: Prologue
msItem.rubric: epistola ieronimi ad paulinum presbiterum de omnibus diuinis historie libris
msItem.incipit: FRATER ambrosius tua mihi munuscula perferens detulit

msItem.title: Prologue to the Pentateuch
msItem.rubric: Incipit prefatio iheronimi presbiteri in pentateucum

msItem.title: Prologue to Kings
msItem.incipit: UIGINTI et duas litteras apud hebreos esse

msItem.title: Prologue to Tobias
msItem.incipit: CROMATIO et heliodoro episcopis iheronimus presbiter in domino salutem Mirari non desino

msItem.title: Prologue to Job
msItem.incipit: COGOR per singulos scripture diuine libros

msItem.title: Prologue to Ecclesiasticus
msItem.incipit: MVLTORVM nobis et magnorum per legem

msItem.title: Prologue to Jeremias
msItem.incipit: HIEREMIAS propheta cui hic prologus scribitur

msItem.title: Prologue to Baruch
msItem.incipit: LIBer iste qui baruch nomine prenotatur

msItem.title: Prologue to Ezechiel
msItem.incipit: HEZECHIEL propheta cum ioachim rege iuda

msItem.title: Prologue to Osee
msItem.incipit: TEMPORIBUS ozie et ioathe achaz et ezechie

msItem.title: Prologue to Amos
msItem.incipit: OZIAS rex cum domini legem sollicite emularetur

msItem.title: Prologue to Micheas
msItem.incipit: TEMPORIBVS ioatham et achaz et ezechie regum Iuda

msItem.title: Prologue to Matthew
msItem.incipit: MATHEUS ex iudea sicut in ordine primus ponitur

msItem.title: Prologue to Luke
msItem.incipit: LVCAS syrus natione antiocensis arce medicus

msItem.title: Prologue to Romans
msItem.incipit: Iam dudum Saulus procerum precepta secutus

msItem.title: Prologue to Romans
msItem.incipit: Causa hec est ecclesiam e duobus populis

msItem.title: Prologue to James
msItem.incipit: NON ita ordo est apud grecos

msItem.title: Prologue to 1 Peter
msItem.incipit: Discipulus saluatoris inuicti toto orbe diffusos

msItem.title: Prologue to 1 John
msItem.incipit: Rationem uerbi et quod deus ipse sit

msItem.title: The books of the New Testament
msItem.incipit: Natus adoratur lotum temptat docet orat
msItem.explicit: flebunt ad cenam surgunt sponsam venio iam

supportDesc.foliation: Running titles in red and blue ink.
supportDesc.condition: Occasional holes, for example on , , , and . Repairs on , , . On , a piece of the parchment has been cut out. Two leaves missing after . The edges have been trimmed, resulting in occasional loss of text.

layout.note: Guidelines and ruling in ink. Pricking visible on some folios.

handDesc.handNote: Gothic cursive, ca 15th century (On Bible readings for the liturgical year)
Semi-hybrida (On the order of the Biblical books)

p.note: In brown ink by a late medieval hand: annotations and corrections.
Middle column, in brown ink by a later medieval hand: verba nehemie filii helchie.
In the left margin, in pencil by a modern hand: [Valafrid Strabo].

In light brown ink by a late medieval hand: Quando fuit bellum te littera certificabit Anno domini m ccc lxx dominica Exurge quare Bellum in prusia commissum et amissum anno domini m cccc xo diuisione apostolorum Item ibi ceciderunt qui operantur iniquitatem etc Iuuenes tempore perditi belli ii annis adiunctis. Below this, in dark brown ink: Item anno domini m cccc xxxiii desolata est Oliua a Polonis, Hussitis etc die Egidii.

decoDesc.p: Main text in brown ink. Plain initials of varying size in red and blue. Rubrics, incipits and explicits in red. Incipits in brown ink, touched in red. Running titles in red and blue. Chapter numbers in red and blue. Guideletters visible. For further description, see also Lindqvist Sandgren.

decoNote.p: : Puzzle initial F in red and blue over 34 lines, with pen-flourishing and marginal stem expanding over the whole page. : Plain initial I in red and blue over 22 lines, with pen-flourishing marginal stem expanding to the lower margin. ; : Plain initials in red and blue over 13-19 lines, with pen-flourishing. ; ; ; ; ; ; ; ; ; ; ; and (with stems expanding over the page); ; : Puzzle initials in red and blue over 8-12 lines. , , : Plain intitials in red and blue over 8-9 lines, with pen-flourishing. Plain initials in red, blue and brown ink with pen-flourishing over 2-3 lines throughout the volume. : plain initials in blue and red over 1 line.
